rulings.Case Title: BERNARD STRONG VS. BROWNING PROPERTIES LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Pursuant To Subpoena Duces Tecum By 445 O Farrell Street Llc And Suresh Patel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 15, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT 445 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC, SURESH PATEL Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Pursuant To Subpoena Duces Tecum By 445 O Farrell Street Llc And Suresh Patel GRANTED. No opposition filed. A redacted copy of the settlement agreement (identifying the parties to the agreement and the scope of the claims released by the parties ) in case CGC-14-539665 shall be produced within 10 days notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EAGLE VISTA EQUITIES, LLC VS. MARIO SORTO ET AL (dft 170.6 challenge Judge Robertson III)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief Pursuant To Ccp 473
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 15, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF EAGLE VISTA EQUITIES, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief Pursuant To CCP 473 GRANTED. Mandatory relief under CCP 473(b) is granted. Order sustaining the demurrer to First Amended Complaint without leave to amend is vacated. Plaintiff to file and serve Second Amended Complaint no later than March 18, 2016. = (501/REQ)
